github.refresh.too_recent: ⏱️ Just checked ${owner}/${repo} — projects rarely change that fast. Try again in ${seconds}s.
github.refresh.rate_limited: 🚦 GitHub API rate limit reached. Resets at ${resetsAt}.
github.refresh.archived: 📦 ${owner}/${repo} is archived — no further updates expected.
github.refresh.parser_failed: Which GitHub repo? Please tell me as `owner/repo`.
